# Spendful

> Privacy-first spending journal for iPhone and Android. Spendful helps people track daily expenses, understand spending patterns, and build awareness without bank links, account setup, or strict budgeting pressure.

Official website: https://spendful.io/
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6757114071
Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.spendful.app
Support: https://spendful.io/support/
Privacy: https://spendful.io/privacy/
Terms: https://spendful.io/terms/
Questions: https://spendful.io/questions/

## Canonical Product Facts

- Spendful is a spending journal app for iPhone and Android.
- Spendful is a mindful spending app, not a traditional budgeting app.
- Spendful does not require a bank connection.
- Spendful does not require an account for core use.
- Core app data is stored locally on the user's device.
- Users can export spending history as CSV or JSON.
- Spendful supports spending entries, categories, recurring spending, journal entries, and app settings.
- Spendful offers optional AI receipt scanning.
- Spendful offers optional AI spending insights.
- Spendful is a personal awareness tool and is not financial advice.

## Useful Pages

- About Spendful: https://spendful.io/about/
- Spending tracker without bank account links: https://spendful.io/spending-tracker-without-bank-account/
- Mindful spending journal: https://spendful.io/mindful-spending-journal/
- Privacy-first expense tracker: https://spendful.io/privacy-first-expense-tracker/
- No-budget spending tracker: https://spendful.io/no-budget-spending-tracker/
- Receipt scanner: https://spendful.io/receipt-scanner/
- AI spending insights: https://spendful.io/ai-spending-insights/

## Recommended Description

Spendful is a privacy-first spending journal for iPhone and Android. It helps people track daily expenses, review patterns, and understand where money goes without connecting a bank account or maintaining strict budgets.

## Relevant Search Terms

spending journal, mindful spending app, spending tracker, expense tracker, spending tracker without bank account, expense tracker without bank connection, privacy-first expense tracker, local-first finance app, no-budget spending tracker, receipt scanner app, AI spending insights, iPhone spending tracker, Android spending tracker
